detectors.description:
Version constraint ^0.4.7 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- KeccakCaching
	- EmptyByteArrayCopy
	- DynamicArrayCleanup
	- ImplicitConstructorCallvalueCheck
	- TupleAssignmentMultiStackSlotComponents
	- MemoryArrayCreationOverflow
	- privateCanBeOverridden
	- SignedArrayStorageCopy
	- UninitializedFunctionPointerInConstructor_0.4.x
	- IncorrectEventSignatureInLibraries_0.4.x
	- ExpExponentCleanup
	- NestedArrayFunctionCallDecoder
	- ZeroFunctionSelector
	- DelegateCallReturnValue
	- ECRecoverMalformedInput
	- SkipEmptyStringLiteral
	- ConstantOptimizerSubtraction.
It is used by:
	- ^0.4.7 (Investment.sol#1)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Investment.returnInvestmentRecursive(uint256) (Investment.sol#183-217):
	External calls:
	- ! investors[investorIndex].send(val) (Investment.sol#201)
	- returnInvestmentRecursive(value - val) (Investment.sol#205)
		- ! investors[investorIndex].send(value) (Investment.sol#191)
		- ! investors[investorIndex].send(val) (Investment.sol#201)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- returnInvestmentRecursive(value - val) (Investment.sol#205)
		- balances[investors[investorIndex]] -= value (Investment.sol#189)
		- balances[investors[investorIndex]] = 0 (Investment.sol#199)
	- returnInvestmentRecursive(value - val) (Investment.sol#205)
		- investorIndex ++ (Investment.sol#203)
		- investorIndex ++ (Investment.sol#211)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [Investment.returnInvestmentRecursive(uint256)](Investment.sol#L183-L217):
	External calls:
	- [! investors[investorIndex].send(val)](Investment.sol#L201)
	- [returnInvestmentRecursive(value - val)](Investment.sol#L205)
		- [! investors[investorIndex].send(value)](Investment.sol#L191)
		- [! investors[investorIndex].send(val)](Investment.sol#L201)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [returnInvestmentRecursive(value - val)](Investment.sol#L205)
		- [balances[investors[investorIndex]] -= value](Investment.sol#L189)
		- [balances[investors[investorIndex]] = 0](Investment.sol#L199)
	- [returnInvestmentRecursive(value - val)](Investment.sol#L205)
		- [investorIndex ++](Investment.sol#L203)
		- [investorIndex ++](Investment.sol#L211)

detectors.description:

		- ! investors[investorIndex].send(value) (Investment.sol#191)
		- ! investors[investorIndex].send(val) (Investment.sol#201)

	- Returned(msg.value) (Investment.sol#171)
